news.headline: Patient lifting equipment market to grow at 12.9% CAGR, exceeding US$20,550.1 million by 2035, driven by demand for assistive devices in healthcare.
news.summary: The global patient lifting equipment market is experiencing significant growth, valued at US$5,474.3 million in 2024 and projected to expand at a CAGR of 12.9% from 2025 to 2035. By 2035, it is expected to surpass US$20,550.1 million. Key drivers include the growing elderly population (anticipated 16% by 2050), increase in chronic health conditions, and emphasis on healthcare worker safety. Major players in the industry include Hill-Rom Holdings Inc., Invacare Corporation, Arjo AB, Prism Medical, Guldmann Inc., and Joerns Healthcare. Competitive strategies focus on AI-assisted patient lifting, expansion into homecare and emerging markets, compliance with safety standards, and research in lightweight and portable designs. Considerable advancements are reshaping patient mobility solutions globally.

news.headline: Billionaire Mark Cuban disagrees with Commerce Secretary's views on trade war benefits, stresses importance of services sector.
news.summary: Billionaire investor Mark Cuban challenged Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick's beliefs in the benefits of tariffs and President Donald Trump's trade war on the U.S. manufacturing sector. In response to a BlueSky Social thread discussing Lutnick's CNBC interview, Cuban criticized Lutnick's understanding of capitalism, stating, "Someone needs to explain to our Sec of Commerce how capitalism works." Lutnick focused on how tariffs would aid the manufacturing sector, overlooking the services sector. Cuban underlined the U.S.'s dominance in global tech and the significance of a service-oriented economy, noting the country's surplus in global trade in services. Cuban emphasized the high margins and profits of service exports, highlighting the importance of a service-oriented economy in the U.S.

news.headline: MicroStrategy Inc (NASDAQ:MSTR) announces a $21 billion at-the-market offering program for Series A preferred stock, causing share prices to trade lower.
news.summary: MicroStrategy Inc (MSTR) saw a decrease in its share price as it disclosed an at-the-market offering program worth $21 billion to release and vend Series A preferred stock. The company recently entered a sales agreement, allowing for the issuance and sale of 8% series A perpetual strike preferred stock with a total offering price of up to $21 billion. MicroStrategy intends to distribute the perpetual strike preferred stock over a prolonged period.

Jyske Realkredit A/S to list new Covered Bonds on 11th March 2025. Announcement no. 22/2025 with final terms attached.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, an announcement (no. 22/2025) was made to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S regarding Jyske Realkredit A/S listing new Covered Bonds (SDO) on March 11, 2025. The final terms for these bonds have been released in connection with this listing.

news.headline: Rust-Oleum introduces low odor spray paint for a more pleasant painting experience.
Context Labs and Jonah Energy deepen partnership to advance verified carbon management in Wyoming and New Mexico using AI-powered Decarbonization-as-a-Service™ platform.
news.summary: A recent collaboration has utilized an AI-driven Decarbonization-as-a-Service™ platform to create certified carbon intensity products. Context Labs, known for innovative carbon solutions, has extended its partnership with Jonah Energy, a prominent U.S. company. This venture, announced on March 10, 2025, in Cambridge, Massachusetts, aims to address carbon emissions effectively. The collaboration is set to bring forth significant benefits in the effort to combat climate change and sets a new standard in sustainability practices. This partnership signifies a strategic move towards leveraging advanced technology to reduce carbon footprints in various industries.

news.headline: Crypto platform August raises $10M in funding, hits $7B volume. Backed by Dragonfly, 6MV, SCB Ltd, Robot Ventures. Bridging DeFi with traditional finance.
news.summary: August has successfully raised a $10 million Series A funding round to expand its on-chain finance infrastructure. Leading investors such as Dragonfly, 6MV, SCB Limited, and Robot Ventures have backed August in its mission to enhance its institutional product offerings and facilitate collaboration between decentralized finance (DeFi) and traditional financial systems. The funding round took place in Geneva on March 10, 2025, representing a significant step towards the company's growth and innovation in the financial technology sector.

news.headline: Assemble launches peer intelligence platform for business leaders amid declining trust in media and experts.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Assemble was officially launched in Toronto as a curated peer intelligence platform amidst a backdrop of diminishing trust in media and traditional experts. The platform aims to connect senior business leaders with a dependable resource, leveraging peer insights. Assemble seeks to address the challenges faced in the business world by providing a trustworthy network. This launch comes at a time when businesses are increasingly valuing peer-based knowledge sharing.

news.headline: IPitomy partners with national tech support firm to expand dealer reach nationwide and improve services.
news.summary: IPitomy Communications, LLC, a prominent cloud-based Unified Communications (UC) and Managed Services Provider (MSP), has broadened its dealer network across the nation and bolstered its service and installation capabilities. This announcement was made on March 10, 2025, in Sarasota, Fla. The company aims to improve its reach and efficiency in delivering services to its customers.

news.headline: Creatopy appoints Tammy Nam as CEO, aims to scale as demand for service grows 400% YoY among brands.
news.summary: Creatopy, an AI-powered digital ads platform, has revealed significant growth in demand for its service, with a 400% increase year-over-year among various brands. The company is shifting its focus towards scaling operations to meet this surge in demand. In a recent announcement, Creatopy introduced Tammy H. Nam, the former COO & CMO of Picsart, as its new Chief Executive Officer and Board member. This move comes as the company aims to capitalize on the growing market and further enhance its position in the industry.

news.headline: Utility in Houston produces hydrogen from steel manufacturing off-gases, offering clean energy for heavy industry.
news.summary: Industrial off-gases are now being utilized for on-site hydrogen production, providing a commercially feasible and economically efficient clean energy option for heavy industry. In Houston on March 10, 2025, Utility announced their leadership in offering affordable, reliable, and clean hydrogen solutions to facilitate a profitable transition to clean energy. This sustainable initiative aims to drive a successful energy transition, showcasing the potential for industrial off-gases to play a vital role in the production of hydrogen for various industrial applications.

news.headline: Thrive Causemetics marks 10 years with limited 10th Anniversary Vault Collection including brand bestsellers.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on March 10, 2025, Thrive Causemetics®, a beauty brand established by Karissa Bodnar, is marking its tenth anniversary by launching the exclusive 10th Anniversary Vault Collection. This collection features a selection of top-selling products and is a tribute to the brand's decade-long journey of making a positive difference.

news.headline: Tetra Technologies, Inc. will take part in Roth 37th Annual Conference on March 17-18, 2025 in Dana Point, California.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, TETRA Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: TTI) based in The Woodlands, Texas revealed that its senior management will be present at the Roth 37th Annual Conference in Dana Point, California on March 17 and 18, 2025. Brady Murphy, the Chief Executive, will represent the company at the event.

news.headline: Batteries Plus supplies cutting-edge batteries to power Oklahoma's critical infrastructure including traffic systems and emergency services. Oklahoma City, March 10, 2025.
news.summary: A prominent supplier of B2B batteries and services is spearheading innovation in traffic systems, emergency services, and power grids within the Oklahoma City region. Batteries Plus is significantly contributing to the power supply of Oklahoma's essential infrastructure. This initiative is taking place as of March 10, 2025, without specifying the source.

news.headline: Sweden's military equipment exports reach all-time high amid Ukraine war, soaring to impressive numbers.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been noted that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, marking a significant increase from last month's 5.2%. It has been reported that approximately 2.5 million people are currently out of work, which is up by 700,000 compared to the previous period. This surge in joblessness is a cause for concern for many, as the economy continues to face challenges amidst the ongoing pandemic. Additionally, it has been highlighted that the youth unemployment rate has also climbed to 15.3%, affecting a large portion of the younger population. Experts suggest that immediate action is required to address this growing issue and prevent further economic ramifications.

news.headline: Global & China Autonomous Driving Domain Controller & CCU Industry Report 2024-2025: Impact of One Board/One Chip Solution on Automotive Supply Chain - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A report on Autonomous Driving Domain Controller and Central Control Unit (CCU) for 2024-2025 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The research highlights the significance of the One Board/One Chip solution in autonomous driving technology, expected to revolutionize the automotive supply chain. In the Chinese market, 2.254 million sets of OEM intelligent driving domain controllers were installed in passenger cars from January onwards, showcasing a rapid adoption of advanced technologies in vehicles.

news.headline: Palantir stock up 12% in 2025 despite market correction. Debate on whether to buy or sell amid AI strategy.
news.summary: Despite the stock market's recent fluctuations, Palantir's stock has seen a 12% increase in value in the year 2025. Supporters continue to champion the software company's artificial intelligence approach. However, Palantir's valuation has dropped during the market correction. Investors are now questioning whether Palantir stock is a wise purchase or if selling is the better option.

news.headline: Top 5 biotech stocks stand out with strong ratings and promising charts, are among Tech Leaders.
news.summary: Five of the leading biotech stocks today share key attributes, including robust ratings and promising performance charts as Tech Leaders. These top performers stand out in comparison to most stocks, presenting strong investment potential in the biotech sector.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk stock drops 8% after weight-loss drug fails Phase 3 study against Eli Lilly, giving Lilly the edge.
news.summary: Novo Nordisk's shares plummeted by 8% on Monday following the disappointing results of its weight-loss drug in a Phase 3 trial compared to Eli Lilly's competitor. This setback has now positioned Eli Lilly as having an advantage over Novo Nordisk in this market.

news.headline: Strategy spent $21 billion buying bitcoin at $96,458 per coin since Nov. 10, raising concerns.
news.summary: An investment strategy has spent a total of $21 billion since November 10th, acquiring Bitcoin with an average price of $96,458 per coin. The move could lead to uncertain outcomes in the future due to the substantial amount of money involved.

news.headline: ServiceNow to acquire AI startup Moveworks in $2.85 billion deal to boost AI efforts.
news.summary: In a move to accelerate its artificial intelligence efforts, ServiceNow is reportedly in discussions to purchase AI startup Moveworks for $3 billion. The acquisition deal is valued at $2.85 billion. This strategic acquisition aims to strengthen ServiceNow's capabilities in the AI space and enhance its offerings to customers. The potential acquisition signifies ServiceNow's commitment to expanding its AI portfolio and staying at the forefront of technological innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Redfin's stock surges as Rocket acquires for $1.75B, RKT stock drops. Expansion in mortgage strategy noted.
news.summary: Rocket has announced a $1.75 billion acquisition of Redfin to bolster its mortgage strategy. Following the news, Rocket's stock dropped while Redfin shares surged. The acquisition is aimed at expanding Rocket's reach in the mortgage industry.

news.headline: Protagonist Therapeutics soars after drug outperforms Bristol's in psoriasis study, prompting stock rise.
news.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics saw a significant surge in its stock on Monday following the success of its drug in a psoriasis study, surpassing the results of a competing drug from Bristol. The breakthrough drug unveiled by Protagonist Therapeutics is being hailed as 'paradigm-shifting.' The company's stock experienced a notable increase in value on the market as a result of this positive development.

news.headline: Shiba Inu's burn rate spikes 1,083%, holding strong at $0.00001267 and $7.5 billion market cap; key metrics rise amidst market weakness.
news.summary: Despite the overall market downturn, Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) continues to stand firm, displaying strength in burn rate and important metrics. Currently priced at $0.00001267, SHIB holds a market cap of $7.5 billion, exhibiting a 24-hour positive trend of +2.3% but a 7-day decline of -10.6%. In comparison, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is priced at $0.1754 with a market cap of $26 billion, showing a -4.9% trend in 24 hours and -20.7% in 7 days. Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) stands at $0.056418 with a market cap of $2.7 billion, showcasing a 3% increase in 24 hours but a significant drop of -23.1% over the past 7 days. Trader insights suggest a potential buying opportunity for SHIB due to a price correction near resistance levels, as highlighted by the TradingView analyst The Hunters Company. Furthermore, crypto chart expert Ali Martinez emphasizes the importance of SHIB maintaining above $0.000013 for a sustained bullish momentum. For more details, refer to the latest updates on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Latest updates from the CERAWeek conference by S&P Global Energy, stay tuned for big insights and numbers.
Bloomberg reports on performance of Consumer Discretionary sector & industry.
OIF workshop on 448Gbps signaling for AI, addressing transition to 400G/lane. Event on April 15-16, 2025 in Santa Clara.
news.summary: In Fremont, California, a public industry workshop titled “Addressing the Next Rate Challenges: 448Gbps Signaling for AI” will take place on April 15-16, 2025, at the Hilton Santa Clara in Silicon Valley. The event, hosted by OIF and co-sponsored by the Ethernet All, aims to tackle the industry's dual challenge of finalizing 224Gbps signaling while gearing up for the shift towards 400G/lane technologies. With AI and machine learning applications fueling a surge in data rates, the demand for higher speeds is unprecedented. The workshop will focus on addressing these challenges and is crucial as technology advances.

news.headline: India's Careernet Group enters U.S. market, appoints Sunil Chaudhary as Partner for Longhouse. Expansion aims to strengthen talent solutions.
news.summary: Careernet, the top talent solutions provider in India, has revealed its plans to enter the U.S. market as a crucial step in its strategic growth. The move signifies the company's commitment to expanding its operations globally, tapping into the potential of the U.S. job market. This significant development marks a new chapter for Careernet, known for its innovative recruitment solutions and top-notch services in India.

news.headline: Ambrose raises over $400 million for its largest fundraise, Ambrose Fund IV; diverse mix of public pension funds involved.
news.summary: Ambrose, a prominent player in industrial, logistics, and e-commerce real estate, has recently sealed the deal on Ambrose Fund IV, LP ("Ambrose IV" or the "Fund"), marking its largest fund to date. Garnering significant investor interest, Ambrose successfully raised $400,625,000 through equity commitments for the Fund and associated vehicles. This milestone signifies a shift in Ambrose's investor landscape, now encompassing a varied array of public pension funds, including the Indiana Public Retirement System.

news.headline: MOO Imbalance
TTPOA in Fort Worth partners with R3 Program to address moral injury; enhancing resilience training platform.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, the Texas Tactical Police Officers Association (TTPOA) has announced a new collaboration with the R3 - Respond, Restore, Resolve Program.

news.headline: German reforms and increased spending essential, according to Nagel.
First patient joins PREEMIE study to assess Bloom™ Micro Occluder for patent ductus arteriosus in premature infants.
news.summary: A multicenter, prospective study has been conducted to assess the safety and effectiveness of the Bloom™ Micro Occluder System in treating patent ductus arteriosus in premature infants. This study involved multiple medical centers and focused on evaluating how well the device works and its impact on patient well-being. The study aimed to investigate the outcomes of using the Bloom™ Micro Occluder System in premature infants with patent ductus arteriosus, a common heart condition in newborns. The study included a significant number of participants and was specifically designed to gather data on the safety and efficacy of this treatment approach.

news.headline: Vivopower launches $5 million stock buyback program today, engaging broker for open market purchases.
news.summary: Starting today, a Stock Buyback Program is set to begin, during which a broker will be responsible for conducting open market purchases of the company's stock. This initiative involves significant monetary transactions and aims to enhance shareholder value by reducing the number of outstanding shares in circulation.

news.headline: Global Wind Turbines Database offers industry data on 2028 entries for professionals, researchers, policymakers, and investors.
news.summary: Dublin - A global database specifically focusing on wind turbines has been introduced by ResearchAndMarkets.com. This database comprises 2028 individual entries, providing a detailed resource for stakeholders in the renewable energy industry. The database is meticulously curated to cater to industry professionals, researchers, and policymakers, offering valuable insights for enhancing knowledge and decision-making.

news.headline: Ethereum's price may have hit bottom as $1.8B ETH leaves exchanges, largest outflow since 2022. Current level is around $2,000.
news.summary: Ethereum's native token Ether (ETH) saw its lowest weekly close since November 2023, with a 51% decline in the past 83 days. Ethereum experienced a 27-month high outflow of $1.8 billion in the last week, signaling a potential buying opportunity as holders saw current levels as strategic. The MVRV ratio dropped to 0.8, indicating undervaluation and a potential buying opportunity. The current price of Ether is consolidating near $2,000, showing signs of a bullish reversal with a diamond price pattern, suggesting a potential rebound of 20% to $2,600. Despite closing below the 200-day EMA level for the first time since October 2023, Ether has historically rebounded when dropping below this trendline, but a prolonged period could extend the bottom price target. Investors are advised to conduct their own research before making any investment decisions.

news.headline: Alberta Premier hopes to meet US officials to discuss tariffs.
Alberta Premier sees no tariff-related slowdown to oil output.
Coherent introduces AIM Family of industrial, rack-based multi-kilowatt single mode fiber lasers.
Orion Talent and BlueForge Alliance partner to address skilled labor shortage in Maritime Industrial Base with Navy-funded program.
news.summary: In Cary, North Carolina, the Maritime Industrial Base (MIB) is facing a severe shortage of skilled labor that is now posing a threat to shipbuilding schedules and vital operations. To address this pressing issue, Orion Talent has revealed a new collaboration with BlueForge Alliance (BFA) funded by the Navy. This partnership aims to target the recruitment of the next wave of workforce professionals and to fill key positions within the MIB supply chain. Through this initiative, Orion Talent will be actively seeking and hiring for numerous crucial roles within the industry.

news.headline: Nintendo announces more ways to celebrate MAR10 Day: Game Boy classics and Super Mario Bros. 3 soundtrack for Switch Online members, new LEGO set unveiling for Adults.
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, the latest news on MAR10 Day celebrates Mario with exciting announcements by Nintendo. Nintendo Switch Online members can enjoy Game Boy classics and the Super Mario Bros. 3 soundtrack on Nintendo Music. Additionally, a new LEGO® Super Mario™ range for Adults has been revealed, featuring a detailed, posable display of Mario in his Standard outfit. This collaboration offers fans more ways to celebrate Mario's legacy.

news.headline: Japan’s trade minister to meet with US Commerce Secretary Lutnick Monday - NYT.
FDA expands use of Miach Orthopaedics’ BEAR® Implant for torn ACLs in children, teens of any age & partial tears.
news.summary: A company based in Westborough, Massachusetts known as Miach Orthopaedics has recently announced that their BEAR Implant has received clearance for the treatment of torn ACLs in children and adolescents across all age groups. This includes both complete tears and partial tears of the ACL. This development is significant for young individuals requiring ACL repair, providing them with a viable treatment option.
